title: Sic plate
description: Sic products can offer good heat stability, high mechanical strength at high temperature, excellent thermal stability and distortion resistance at high temperature. It can be used in daily ceramics widely, such as reinforced ceramics, white ceramic and high-class ceramics. Through the burning of 1400℃, its products can offer mild, bright and white enamel feeling, it can save the energy and increase the volume of kiln therefore it can increase the efficiency and economy. At the same time, our kiln furniture is harmless to environment.
author: Hshkrc
attribution_md:
Sic plate
Sic products can offer good heat stability, high mechanical strength at high temperature, excellent thermal stability and distortion resistance at high temperature. It can be used in daily ceramics widely, such as reinforced ceramics, white ceramic and high-class ceramics. Through the burning of 1400℃, its products can offer mild, bright and white enamel feeling, it can save the energy and increase the volume of kiln therefore it can increase the efficiency and economy. At the same time, our kiln furniture is harmless to environment.
